description: 150 - 28-03-2025 - Email exchange between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins (former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

participants.name: Email exchange between Peter Mandelson and Sir Oliver Robbins
participants.role: former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs

text:
(former Permanent Under-Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs, FCDO)

From: Oliver Robbinsi Personal

Sent: Fri 28/03/2025 8:45:13 AM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson Personal Caroline
Hurndall rersonal

Subject: RE: Letter from America

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Peter
Thank you. I’m sure the Foreign Secretary will be interested in this, as | was. We'd
both welcome these sorts of despatches when you think the accumulated issues and

insights warrant them.
kee

Olly

PS: as agreed with your team, I’ve written the new Dep Sec of State a congratulations
letter this morning.

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: 28 March 2025 00:39
To: Caroline Hurndall

Cc: Oliver Robbins

Subject: Letter from America

ee

443

RK

eK

Very best
Peter
Lord Mandelson

HM Ambassador. Washinaton DC
Personal | Personal
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
